ddls:
CREATE TABLE "chromosomes" (
  "chromosome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chromosome */,
  "chromosome_name" TEXT /* The name of the chromosome (e.g., chr1, chr2) */,
  "length" INTEGER /* The length of the chromosome */,
  "assembly" TEXT /* The genome assembly (e.g., hg19, hg38) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chromosome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genetic variant */,
  "chromosome_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chromosome where the variant is located */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* The starting position of the variant on the chromosome */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* The ending position of the variant on the chromosome */,
  "reference_sequence" TEXT /* The reference sequence of the variant */,
  "alternate_sequence" TEXT /* The alternate sequence of the variant */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* The rank of the variant based on its significance */,
  "score" REAL /* The score representing the strength of the variant's association (SOR) */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* The validation status of the variant (e.g., valid, invalid, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variants_chromosome_id FOREIGN KEY ("chromosome_id") REFERENCES chromosomes ("chromosome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variant_types" (
  "variant_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variant type */,
  "variant_type_name" TEXT /* The name of the variant type */,
  "variant_type_description" TEXT /* The description of the variant type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variant_variant_type" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variant */,
  "variant_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variant type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id", "variant_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variant_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variant being annotated */,
  "gene" TEXT /* The gene affected by the variant */,
  "functional_impact" TEXT /* The functional impact of the variant */,
  "disease_association" TEXT /* Any associated diseases or conditions */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_annotations_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variants ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diseases" (
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease */,
  "disease_name" TEXT /* The name of the disease */,
  "disease_description" TEXT /* The description of the disease */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variant_disease" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variant */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id", "disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* The institution the user belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* The role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variant_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variant being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the variant */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the variant data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, analyze) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_access_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variants ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variant_populations" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population */,
  "population_name" TEXT /* The name of the population */,
  "population_description" TEXT /* The description of the population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variant_population" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variant */,
  "population_id" INTEGER /* ID of the population */,
  "frequency" REAL /* The frequency of the variant in the population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id", "population_id")
)
